To: Danielle O’Connor <danielle.oconnor@frontrangehrconsult.com>
Date: 2026-01-22 09:18 MST
Subject: Follow-up details for potential witness statement

Hi Danielle,

Thank you again for taking the time to speak with me yesterday about the ongoing situation with FrontRange Health Services and the possibility of filing a formal complaint. I wanted to follow up with a few details you said would be helpful for your notes.

For contact purposes, my primary telephone number is (303) 555-1284. That’s the best way to reach me during the day, since I keep my ringer on while I’m home working on job applications and helping Ethan with school stuff.

You also asked about potential witnesses who could speak to how my mental health and sleep were affected after I was put on unpaid administrative leave. My younger sister, Angela Renee Martinez, is probably the best person. She lives in Albuquerque, but she flew up in early May 2024 and stayed with me for five days at my apartment on W 32nd Avenue after I told her over the phone that I’d started having trouble sleeping and was drinking 2–3 glasses of wine most nights just to wind down. She saw firsthand how anxious and exhausted I was, and how the comments from my supervisor about my age and medical appointments were weighing on me.

If you need to speak with Angela directly, I can ask her if she’s comfortable with that and then share her contact information in a separate email.

Please let me know if there’s anything else you need from me this week.

Best,
Maria

Hey Ang,

I’m filling out yet another set of forms tonight for that mediation intake and a couple of job applications, and they all want a “primary telephone number” plus an emergency contact. Denver Health Neurology Clinic

Hey Ang,

I’m filling out yet another set of forms for the unemployment appeal and for the therapist’s office, and they both want a “contact person” with an address. Since you’re already my emergency contact, I’m going to keep using your place as the backup contact address.

Just to confirm, I still have it right as:

Angela Renee Martinez
4213 Lomas Blvd NE, Apt 204
Albuquerque, NM 87110

If anything’s changed (like if you finally ditched that noisy building and moved closer to Sandia), tell me ASAP so I don’t send official stuff to the wrong place. They’re being super picky about details, especially for the unemployment appeal.

I also had to explain again how close you and I are compared to everyone else. I mentioned that when everything blew up at FrontRange last year, you were the one calling to check on me every night, even though Witness 1 for the case is actually my close friend and former team lead, Kevin Douglas Harper, who drove me to Denver Health Medical Center on March 18, 2024, after I had that panic attack at my cubicle.

Anyway, text me if you want me to put a different address down. Love you.

– Maria

Luis A. Thompson

Rosa Elena & Javier Luis Martinez
